entities.name: SCLEROSPORA GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: An oomycetous obligate parasite and the downy mildew pathogen of pearl millet

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The host crop affected by Sclerospora graminicola

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: The disease caused by Sclerospora graminicola in pearl millet

entities.name: FERTILITY
entities.description: The ability of Sclerospora graminicola isolates to produce oospores

entities.name: MATING TYPE FREQUENCY
entities.description: The distribution and proportion of different mating types within a population of Sclerospora graminicola

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country from which the Sclerospora graminicola isolates were collected

entities.name: SINGLE-ZOOSPORE ISOLATES
entities.description: The technique used to obtain pure isolates of Sclerospora graminicola for study

entities.name: OOSPORE PRODUCTION POTENTIAL
entities.description: The criterion used to test and determine the fertility of the isolates

entities.name: SELF-STERILE
entities.description: The inability of an isolate to produce oospores when paired with itself

entities.name: SELF-FERTILE
entities.description: The ability of an isolate to produce oospores when paired with itself

entities.name: HOMOTHALLISM
entities.description: The condition where a single individual is capable of sexual reproduction without a partner

entities.name: MAT A
entities.description: One of the two standard mating types identified in Sclerospora graminicola

entities.name: MAT B
entities.description: One of the two standard mating types identified in Sclerospora graminicola

entities.name: GENETIC STRUCTURE
entities.description: The dynamic organization of genetic variation within the Sclerospora graminicola population

entities.name: VIRULENCE
entities.description: The ability of the pathogen to cause disease in the host crop
